warnings.message: Base tables list includes tables not in moduleTableIds (e.g., order_item, inventory_transaction, inventory_balance_snapshot, daily_shift). If those are intended, ensure they exist as base tables in the solution or align naming to existing module tables (OrderItem vs order_item, InventoryTransaction vs inventoryTransaction, etc.).

T-013: each metric table should include dimensions for direct ontology FKs of its source entities. Some tables appear to include extra non-FK dims (menuCategoryId, orderType) but may be missing required direct relationships like MenuItem->MenuCategory, OrderItem->MenuItem, Order->DailyShift, Order->DiningTable (optional) consistently per source entity; validate and add any missing FK dimensions per source entity relationship map.
shiftSummaryMetrics.dimensions.orderId uses type 'text' while other tables use 'uuid' for order_id; prefer consistent FK type.
Dashboard actor uses 'managerOwner' which is a valid finalPlan actorId; ensure accessPolicy format matches platform conventions (string ok).

All metric tables use timeColumn 'event_timestamp' but source events vary; ensure the metric tables actually store this column and it is set from the L3 handler event time to avoid ambiguity (shift close vs order close vs inventory tx posted).

questions: Existe no modelo/base de dados do módulo uma tabela física separada para OrderItem (order_item) e para snapshots/transações de estoque com nomes snake_case, ou os nomes corretos são inventoryTransaction / inventoryBalanceSnapshot / dailyShift conforme moduleTableIds?

Pode compartilhar/confirmar o mapa de relacionamentos diretos da ontologia (FKs) entre Order, OrderItem, MenuItem, MenuCategory, DailyShift, DiningTable, InventoryTransaction, InventoryBalanceSnapshot para validar o cumprimento do T-013?
trace: Reviewed contract focus: table count vs approvedArtifacts.metricTables (4) matches; storageEngine ok; updateResponsibility layer_3_usecases ok; dashboard references metricTables ids ok; checked moduleTableIds vs sourceBaseTables; checked T-013 dimension coverage heuristically; checked type consistency for FK dims; checked dashboard actorId vs finalPlan actors.
